zoneIssueConcentration.description: Per-zone breakdown of total open issues and distinct auditees contributing those issues, with average issues per auditee. Sorted descending by avgIssuesPerAuditee to surface the zone with the highest issue concentration.

topGroupsByIssues.description: Top 3 groups by total issue count, with their corresponding audit type names.

topAuditeesByCriticalIssues.description: Top 3 auditees by combined High + Zero Tolerance issue count, with individual breakdown of each risk level.
